description: Geometry, data, and table references used for model setup, imported measurements, and time/property curves.

items.name: geometry-workflow
items.description: Geometry import/export, grouping, range filtering, and zone geometry-test workflows.
items.common_use: Use CAD/surface data for grouping, plotting, and selecting model regions.

items.name: data-sets
items.description: Data scalar/vector/tensor/label set workflows for imported measurements and results overlays.
items.common_use: Store measured values or derived data in model-space data sets.

items.name: table-curves
items.description: Table creation/import/export and use as load, property, and history curves.
items.common_use: Drive time-dependent boundary conditions or store exported history curves.
